662 ENGL - English

ENGL459 Selected Topics in LGBTQ+ Literatures and Media (3 Credits) Advanced study of a topic pertinent to literary and cultural expressions of LGBTQ+ identities, positionalities, and analytics through an exploration of literature, art, and/or media.
